title: Master the Critical Rendering Path (CRP)
description: Analyze the interplay between the DOM, CSSOM, and the Pixel Pipeline to understand browser rendering. Implement strategies to eliminate jank and layout thrashing by optimizing the Critical Rendering Path.
objectives: Analyze the interplay between the DOM, CSSOM, and the Pixel Pipeline to understand browser rendering.
Implement strategies to eliminate jank and layout thrashing by optimizing the Critical Rendering Path.
